screen.rationale: Piotroski 6/9 = 66.7% (above 55% WATCH cutoff but below 75% PASS cutoff) with Magic Formula PASS (EY 7.78%, ROIC 19.0% — both clear single-ticker thresholds); methodology piotroski_canonical_v1; strengths are positive ROA + OCF, OCF-backed earnings (low accruals), declining LT-debt ratio, stable share count, and gross-margin expansion; offset by ROA decline YoY (net income fell from $2.90B to $1.31B), current-ratio dip, and asset-turnover decline.

signal.qualitative_note: Override 2.5 (SBC-distorted earnings): GAAP-profitable (reported EPS $1.28) and FCF-positive ($2.42B TTM), but SBC ($2.27/sh) fully absorbs reported EPS so clean TTM EPS is negative (-$0.99). Dilution overhang, not a quality failure — pre-empts Override 3 (Qualitative=FAIL).
signal.condition: Clean TTM EPS is negative (-$0.99) because SBC ($2.27/sh) exceeds reported EPS ($1.28/sh). Standard DCF cannot anchor. Re-invoke with `/stock-model XYZ --pre-profit --confirm` to value via revenue/FCF multiple with explicit dilution schedule.

bear.narrative: Revenue miss, margin stalls at TTM level, accelerated dilution, comp multiples compress to PYPL/GPN floor.

base.narrative: Consensus revenue; FCF margin expands 500 bps over 5y via Cash App operating leverage; trailing dilution persists.

bull.narrative: Cash App ad monetisation + BNPL scale; margin lifts to ADYEN-like 20%; SBC tapers as RSU grants vest; multiples re-rate toward TOST.

sensitivity.note: Exit multiple dominates — ±1.0× absolute swing moves base IV by ±27% (vs WACC ±100 bps ≈ ±7%, dilution ±200 bps ≈ ±10%, terminal margin ±300 bps ≈ ±2%).

position_sizing.rationale: WATCH × WITHIN BEAR–BASE (price $69.89 vs base IV $154.08, MoS +120.4%) → 2–3% band; MEDIUM-confidence cap (pre-profit variant always caps MEDIUM) does not bind at upper=3%.

timing.sue_caveat: 4-quarter std-dev is statistically weaker than the 8-quarter window used in the academic literature; treat SUE > 1.5 as the noise floor for v1.
timing.rationale: SUE 1.40 just below the 1.5 v1 noise floor — Q1'26 beat of +25.6% on EPS partly offset by Q3'25 miss of -18.1% inflating the surprise std-dev; PEAD IN WINDOW at day 44 of 60 (regular band, not late) on a positive SUE; revision direction N/A (yf MCP get_revisions tool not implemented); estimated next earnings 2026-06-29, 46 days out — well past the 7-day and 14-day override thresholds. Verdict NEUTRAL: drift is technically still in play but SUE doesn't clear the noise floor and revisions are blind.
